sic_description: Heating Equip, Except Elec & Warm Air; & Plumbing Fixtures
summary: PART I Our Company FGI is a global, diversified and reputable supplier of quality bath and kitchen products. With over thirty years of experience, FGI has become a leading business to business supplier of bath and kitchen products to large retail, wholesale, commercial and specialty channel customers around the globe specializing in the home improvement and R&R (Repair & Remodel) markets.
